title: Skills quality gate
description: Canonical skills, manifest, structure, and drift checks.
requiredEvidence: Skill counts and categories match bootstrap-manifest.json
Drift status recorded when strict profile requires -Strict on drift tool
strictModeBehavior: Evaluator passes -Strict to verify-skills-manifest and verify-skills-drift when the caller sets -Strict; any fail status or disallowed warn blocks the gate.
